neighborhoods.name: Atenas Centro
neighborhoods.description: Small town center famous for having one of the best climates in the world, with a central park and local market
neighborhoods.character: Small-town walkable, pleasant climate, traditional Tico culture

housing.predominantType: Houses and small apartments near the central park

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Atenas. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Santa Eulalia
neighborhoods.description: Rural residential area above Atenas with valley views and cooler temperatures

housing.predominantType: Houses on large lots with gardens

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Atenas's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Barrio Jesus
neighborhoods.description: Adjacent community with lower costs and easy access to Atenas services
neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Roca Verde / Los Angeles
neighborhoods.description: Hillside areas above town popular with North American retirees, with established expat organizations
neighborhoods.character: Expat hillside community, organized social groups, scenic

housing.predominantType: Modern houses in gated communities and custom-built homes

neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.
